scripts.dev: concurrently -n "API,APP,ADM" -c "blue,magenta,green" "npm run dev:api --silent" "npm run dev:app --silent" "npm run dev:admin --silent"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: concurrently "cd forgy_mobile_app && npm run build" "cd forgy_admin_web && npm run build"
scripts.install:all: npm install && concurrently "cd forgy_backend_api && npm install" "cd forgy_mobile_app && npm install" "cd forgy_admin_web && npm install"
scripts.install:frontend: concurrently "cd forgy_mobile_app && npm install" "cd forgy_admin_web && npm install"
scripts.db:init: cd forgy_backend_api && docker compose up -d postgres && node -e "setTimeout(() => console.log('DB Lista'), 5000)" && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx prisma generate
scripts.clean: npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json forgy_backend_api/node_modules forgy_backend_api/package-lock.json forgy_mobile_app/node_modules forgy_mobile_app/package-lock.json forgy_admin_web/node_modules forgy_admin_web/package-lock.json
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm run setup
